news.t: Moving Beyond Beta: BlackRock Embraces Active International Fixed Income
ETFs are on pace to take in a record $1.3 trillion in 2025. Here's where the money's going.
BlackRock Expands Active ETF Platform with Launch of a Global Government Bond Hedged ETF

overview.description: The iShares Global Government Bond USD Hedged Active ETF (GGOV) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in broad credit fixed income. The fund is actively managed, investing in government securities globally. It includes bonds of different maturities and credit quality GGOV was launched on Jun 25, 2025 and is issued by BlackRock.

data.title: Moving Beyond Beta: BlackRock Embraces Active International Fixed Income
data.text: The iShares Global Government Bond USD Hedged Active ETF (GGOV) experienced an unexpected trading surge on Thursday, May 28, with volume exploding to more than 40 million shares. GGOV launched in late...

data.title: ETFs are on pace to take in a record $1.3 trillion in 2025. Here's where the money's going.
data.text: Investors keep piling into exchange-traded funds — with the latest monthly flow data reflecting some limit to their appetite for risk in the U.S., as well as a desire to diversify internationally.

data.title: BlackRock Expands Active ETF Platform with Launch of a Global Government Bond Hedged ETF
